description: This column holds the unique identifier for a specific hotel property.
name: property_code

description: This column holds the name of the hotel property.
name: property_name

description: This column holds the date of the guest's stay.
name: stay_date

description: This column holds the general classification of a room.
name: roomtype

description: This column holds the specific class or category of a room.
name: roomclass

description: This column holds the date when the data snapshot was taken.
name: snapshot_date

description: This column holds the total number of rooms available for booking.
name: available_rooms

description: This column holds the number of rooms on the books for a future date.
name: rooms_otb

description: This column holds the number of rooms on the books for the same time last year.
name: rooms_stly

description: This column holds the number of rooms on the books for the same time two years ago.
name: rooms_st2y

description: This column holds the actual number of rooms booked for the same period last year.
name: rooms_ly_actual

description: This column holds the forecasted number of rooms expected to be booked.
name: rooms_forecast

description: This column holds the forecasted average daily rate for rooms.
name: rms_adr_forecast

description: This column holds the revenue on the books for a future date.
name: rev_otb

description: This column holds the revenue on the books for the same time last year.
name: rev_stly

description: This column holds the revenue on the books for the same time two years ago.
name: rev_st2y

description: This column holds the actual revenue generated for the same period last year.
name: rev_ly_actual

description: This column holds the forecasted revenue from rooms.
name: rms_rev_forecast

description: This column holds the number of rooms that have been cancelled.
name: cancelled_rooms

description: This column holds the actual number of cancelled rooms for the same period last year.
name: cancelled_rooms_ly_actual

description: This column holds the number of rooms where guests did not arrive.
name: noshow_rooms

description: This column holds the actual number of no-show rooms for the same period last year.
name: noshow_rooms_ly_actual

description: This column holds the unique code for a specific room type.
name: roomtype_code

description: This column holds the classification of a room type.
name: roomtype_class

description: This column holds the code for the category of a room type.
name: roomtype_category_code

description: This column holds the base category description for a room type.
name: roomtype_category_base

description: This column holds the general category of a room type.
name: roomtype_category

description: This column holds the number of available rooms for a specific room type.
name: roomtype_available_rooms

description: This column holds a numerical value used for sorting room types.
name: roomtype_sort
